title: Paramount Lands Elegance Bratton’s Crime Thriller ‘By Any Means,’ Starring Yahya Abdul-Mateen II and Mark Wahlberg
content:
ByAngelique Jackson

Paramount Pictures has acquired U.S. rights to “By Any Means,” a civil rights era-set crime thriller from directorElegance Bratton, starringYahya Abdul-Mateen IIandMark Wahlberg.

The studio has dated the film for theatrical release on Sept. 4.

Set against the backdrop of 1966 Mississippi and inspired by true events, the film’s logline explains, “By Any Means” follows “a volatile partnership between a hardened mafia hitman and a young Black FBI agent as they are forced into an uneasy alliance to track down those responsible for the killing of civil rights leaders — uncovering a conspiracy that tests the limits of justice, loyalty, and survival.”

Nicole Beharie, David Strathairn, Giancarlo Esposito, Josh Lucas and Ethan Embry round out the top-tier cast.

“This is a story about unlikely alliances forged under impossible circumstances — where justice is not clean, and the truth comes at a cost,” said Bratton. “I wanted to explore what it means to confront violence not just as an act, but as a system — and what it demands of those caught inside it.”

Bratton directs from a screenplay by Sascha Penn. He and Chester Algernal Gordon produced the project under their Freedom Principle banner, alongside Alex Lebovici for Hammerstone Studios; Basil Iwanyk and Erica Lee for Thunder Road; and Wahlberg and Stephen Levinson for Municipal.

The high-profile project follows Bratton’s narrative feature directorial debut, “The Inspection,” which premiered at the 2022 Toronto International Film Festival, where it garnered rave reviews. The film, starring Jeremy Pope and Gabrielle Union, was based onBratton’s own experiencesas a young gay man in the Marines during the “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” era and a fractured relationship with his mother. Bratton also directed the acclaimed documentaries 2019’s “Pier Kids,” winner of the Truer than Fiction award from Film Independent, and last year’s “Move Ya Body: The Birth of House.”

WME Independent handled the sale. North.five.six is handling international sales of the film.
title_zh: 派拉蒙影業(Paramount)簽下優雅·布拉頓(Elegance Bratton)的犯罪驚悚片《不擇手段(By Any Means)》，主演為雅雅·阿布杜-馬丁二世(Yahya Abdul-Mateen II)和馬克·沃爾伯格(Mark Wahlberg)。
content_zh:
由安琪莉克·傑克森(Angelique Jackson)報導

派拉蒙影業(Paramount Pictures)已獲得《無論如何(By Any Means)》的美國發行權，這是一部由導演艾根斯·布拉頓(Elegance Bratton)執導的民權時代犯罪驚悚片，主演包括雅哈·阿卜杜勒-馬丁二世(Yahya Abdul-Mateen II)和馬克·沃爾伯格(Mark Wahlberg)。

該片定於9月4日上映。

故事背景設置在1966年的密西西比州，靈感來自真實事件，影片的簡介說明《無論如何(By Any Means)》講述了一名老練的黑手黨殺手和一名年輕的黑人FBI探員之間的動盪夥伴關係，他們被迫結成不安的聯盟，以追查負責殺害民權領袖的人，揭開一個考驗正義、忠誠和生存極限的陰謀。

尼可·比哈里(Nicole Beharie)、大衛·斯特雷瑟恩(David Strathairn)、詹卡洛·埃斯波西托(Giancarlo Esposito)、喬希·盧卡斯(Josh Lucas)和伊桑·恩布里(Ethan Embry)也加入了這部高水準的演出陣容。

布拉頓表示：“這是一個在不可能的情況下形成的不太可能的聯盟的故事——正義並不乾淨，而真相是有代價的。我想探索面對暴力不僅僅是作為一種行為，而是一種系統的意義——以及這對那些被困在其中的人要求什麼。”

布拉頓根據薩莎·佩恩(Sascha Penn)的劇本執導此片。他和切斯特·阿爾根納爾·戈登(Chester Algernal Gordon)在他們的自由原則(Freedom Principle)名下製作此項目，並與亞歷克斯·萊博維奇(Alex Lebovici)為哈默斯通影業(Hammerstone Studios)合作；巴茲·伊萬尼克(Basil Iwanyk)和艾瑞卡·李(Erica Lee)為雷霆路(Thunder Road)合作；以及沃爾伯格和史蒂芬·萊文森(Stephen Levinson)為市政(Municipal)合作。

這個高調的項目是布拉頓的敘事長片導演處女作《檢查(The Inspection)》的後續作品，該片於2022年多倫多國際電影節首映，並獲得好評。影片主演包括傑瑞米·波普(Jeremy Pope)和加布里埃爾·尤尼恩(Gabrielle Union)，故事基於布拉頓作為一名年輕同性戀海軍在“別問，別說”(Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell)時期的經歷，以及與母親的破裂關係。布拉頓還執導了備受讚譽的紀錄片《碼頭孩子(Pier Kids)》，該片於2019年獲得獨立電影協會的真實勝於虛構(Truer than Fiction)獎，以及去年的《動起來：浩室音樂的誕生(Move Ya Body: The Birth of House)》。

WME Independent負責此次銷售。North.five.six負責該片的國際銷售。
summary_zh:
由安琪莉克·傑克森(Angelique Jackson)報導

派拉蒙影業(Paramount Pictures)已獲得《無論如何(By Any Means)》的美國發行權，這是一部由導演艾根斯·布拉頓(Elegance Bratton)執導的民權時代犯罪驚悚片，主演包括雅哈·阿卜杜勒-馬丁二世(Yahya Abdul-Mateen II)和馬克·沃爾伯格(Mark Wahlberg)。
